sentences.target: Ich will meinen Schlüssel nicht verlieren.

translations.de: Ich will meinen Schlüssel nicht verlieren.
translations.en: I don't want to lose my key.
translations.fr: Je ne veux pas perdre ma clé.
translations.it: Non voglio perdere la mia chiave.
translations.ru: Я не хочу потерять свой ключ.
translations.he: אני לא רוצה לאבד את המפתח שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn làm mất chìa khóa của mình.
translations.nl: Ik wil mijn sleutel niet kwijtraken.
translations.uk: Я не хочу загубити свій ключ.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी चाबी खोना नहीं चाहता।
translations.el: Δεν θέλω να χάσω το κλειδί μου.
translations.nb: Jeg vil ikke miste nøkkelen min.
translations.sv: Jag vill inte tappa bort min nyckel.
translations.da: Jeg vil ikke miste min nøgle.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1st sg) expressing volition; selects a bare infinitive placed at the clause end ('verlieren').
Possessive determiner agreeing with a masculine accusative singular noun; modifies 'Schlüssel'.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; direct object (what is not to be lost).
Negation particle; negates the proposition/verb phrase.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'; non-separable verb.

sentences.target: Er will nicht gegen seine Schwester verlieren.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ vɪl nɪçt ˈgeːgən ˈzaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ fɛɐ̯ˈliːʁən/

translations.de: Er will nicht gegen seine Schwester verlieren.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ vɪl nɪçt ˈgeːgən ˈzaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ fɛɐ̯ˈliːʁən/
translations.en: He doesn't want to lose to his sister.
translations.es: No quiere perder contra su hermana.
translations.fr: Il ne veut pas perdre contre sa sœur.
translations.it: Non vuole perdere contro sua sorella.
translations.ru: Он не хочет проиграть своей сестре.
translations.pt: Ele não quer perder para a irmã.
translations.vi: Anh ấy không muốn thua chị gái mình.
translations.ar: هو لا يريد أن يخسر أمام أخته.
translations.nl: Hij wil niet verliezen van zijn zus.
translations.uk: Він не хоче програти своїй сестрі.
translations.hu: Nem akar veszíteni a nővére ellen.
translations.hi: वह अपनी बहन से हारना नहीं चाहता।
translations.pl: On nie chce przegrać z siostrą.
translations.el: Δεν θέλει να χάσει από την αδελφή του.
translations.nb: Han vil ikke tape mot søsteren sin.
translations.id: Dia tidak mau kalah dari saudara perempuannya.
translations.sv: Han vill inte förlora mot sin syster.
translations.ro: Nu vrea să piardă în fața surorii lui.
translations.da: Han vil ikke tabe til sin søster.
translations.ja: 彼は姉に負けたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary (present, 3rd sg) selecting the infinitive 'verlieren' at clause end.
Negation particle; scopes over the predicate.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP expressing opposition.
Possessive determiner agreeing with a feminine accusative singular noun; modifies 'Schwester'.
Common noun, feminine accusative (object of the preposition 'gegen'); the PP 'gegen seine Schwester' complements 'verlieren'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Sie will im Büro nicht die Geduld verlieren.
sentences.reading: /ziː vɪl ɪm byˈʁoː nɪçt diː gəˈdʊlt fɛɐ̯ˈliːʁən/

translations.de: Sie will im Büro nicht die Geduld verlieren.
translations.ipa: /ziː vɪl ɪm byˈʁoː nɪçt diː gəˈdʊlt fɛɐ̯ˈliːʁən/
translations.en: She doesn't want to lose her patience at the office.
translations.es: No quiere perder la paciencia en la oficina.
translations.fr: Elle ne veut pas perdre patience au bureau.
translations.it: Non vuole perdere la pazienza in ufficio.
translations.ko: 그녀는 회사에서 참을성을 잃고 싶지 않다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她不想在办公室失去耐心。
translations.yue: 佢唔想喺公司失去耐性。
translations.ru: Она не хочет терять терпение в офисе.
translations.pt: Ela não quer perder a paciência no escritório.
translations.he: היא לא רוצה לאבד את הסבלנות במשרד.
translations.vi: Cô ấy không muốn mất kiên nhẫn ở văn phòng.
translations.ar: هي لا تريد أن تفقد صبرها في المكتب.
translations.nl: Ze wil haar geduld niet verliezen op kantoor.
translations.uk: Вона не хоче втрачати терпіння в офісі.
translations.hu: Nem akarja elveszíteni a türelmét az irodában.
translations.hi: वह दफ़्तर में अपना धैर्य नहीं खोना चाहती।
translations.pl: Nie chce tracić cierpliwości w biurze.
translations.el: Δεν θέλει να χάσει την υπομονή της στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Hun vil ikke miste tålmodigheten på jobb.
translations.id: Dia tidak mau kehilangan kesabaran di kantor.
translations.sv: Hon vill inte tappa tålamodet på jobbet.
translations.ro: Nu vrea să-și piardă răbdarea la birou.
translations.da: Hun vil ikke miste tålmodigheden på kontoret.
translations.fi: Hän ei halua menettää kärsivällisyyttään toimistossa.
translations.ja: 職場で忍耐力を失いたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary selecting the infinitive 'verlieren' at clause end.
Contraction of 'in dem' (ADP + definite article); introduces a locative PP taking dative.
Common noun, neuter dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' in a locative PP.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determines 'Geduld'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object in the idiomatic phrase 'die Geduld verlieren'.
Lexical verb in infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Wir wollen die Verbindung nicht verlieren.

translations.de: Wir wollen die Verbindung nicht verlieren.
translations.en: We don't want to lose the connection.
translations.fr: Nous ne voulons pas perdre la connexion.
translations.he: אנחנו לא רוצים לאבד את החיבור.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không muốn mất kết nối.
translations.nl: We willen de verbinding niet verliezen.
translations.el: Δεν θέλουμε να χάσουμε τη σύνδεση.
translations.ja: 回線が切れるのは嫌だ。

Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determines 'Verbindung'.
